info.title: Ecommerce-buildTime
info.description: This API provides functionality for building and managing ecommerce applications, including product management, order processing, and customer interactions.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product management including creation, update, retrieval, and deletion of products.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Endpoints for managing customer orders, order status, and order history.

tags.name: customers
tags.description: Manage customer information, registration, authentication, and profile updates.

tags.name: payments
tags.description: Handles payment processing, transaction status, and payment methods.

tags.name: inventory
tags.description: Manage inventory levels, stock adjustments, and notifications.

get.summary: Retrieve the shopping cart for the specified user
get.description: Fetches the current shopping cart of the user identified by userId. Returns the cart contents including items and totals.

200.description: Successful retrieval of the user's cart

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid userId or request parameters

example.message: The userId provided is invalid

details.issue: UserId format is incorrect or missing

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add an item to the user's shopping cart
post.description: Adds a specified cart item to the cart of the user identified by userId. The request body must contain the details of the item to add, such as productId, quantity, and options. Returns the updated cart.

requestBody.description: The cart item to add to the user's cart

200.description: Item successfully added to cart; returns updated cart

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid item details or userId

example.message: The cart item details provided are invalid

details.issue: Quantity must be a positive integer

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order for the specified user
post.description: Creates and places a new order for the user identified by userId based on the current cart or provided details. Returns the order confirmation details.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid order data or userId

example.message: The order placement request contains invalid or missing data

details.issue: User ID not found or invalid

404.description: Not Found - User or cart not found

example.message: No user or cart found matching the given userId

details.issue: User or cart does not exist

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve order details by order ID
get.description: Fetches detailed information about an order using the orderId. Returns order status, items, pricing, and shipping information.

example.message: The orderId provided is invalid

details.issue: OrderId format is incorrect or missing

404.description: Not Found - Order does not exist

example.message: No order found with the specified orderId
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Starts a new payment transaction using the provided payment details. The request body must include payment method, amount, and payer information. Returns payment initiation result including transaction ID and status.

requestBody.description: Payment details required to initiate the transaction

example.message: The payment details are incomplete or invalid

details.issue: Card number is missing or malformed

402.description: Payment Required - Payment was declined or insufficient funds

example.message: Payment was declined due to insufficient funds or verification failure
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Processes incoming webhook notifications from the payment provider. Accepts details of payment events such as successful payments, failed transactions, or disputes, and updates the system accordingly.

requestBody.description: Payload representing the payment webhook event

200.description: Acknowledgement of webhook reception and processing

example.message: Webhook processed successfully

400.description: Invalid webhook payload or malformed request

example.message: The webhook payload format is invalid or missing required fields

details.issue: Missing or unrecognized event type field

402.description: Payment required error due to failed payment or account balance issues

example.message: Payment failed or account balance is insufficient

500.description: Internal server error occurred while processing the webhook

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Creates a new product in the product catalog with specified details such as name, description, price, and inventory information. Returns the created product data upon success.

requestBody.description: Payload representing the new product to be added

example.name: Wireless Headphones
example.description: Over-ear Bluetooth headphones with noise cancellation

example.name: Wireless Headphones
example.description: Over-ear Bluetooth headphones with noise cancellation

example.message: Submitted product data is invalid or missing required fields

details.issue: Price must be a positive number

409.description: Product creation conflict due to duplicate SKU or name

example.message: A product with the same SKU or name already exists

500.description: Internal server error during product creation

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Track the shipment status of a specific order
get.description: Retrieves the current tracking information for the specified order, including shipment status, location updates, and estimated delivery date.

404.description: Order not found or tracking data unavailable

example.message: No tracking information found for order with given ID

details.issue: Order ID 'ord-7b3d8f2a' does not exist or has no tracking data

500.description: Internal server error during tracking retrieval

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Creates a new user account with provided user details such as name, email, and password. Returns user profile information upon successful registration.

requestBody.description: Payload representing new user registration details

example.message: User registration data is invalid or missing required fields

409.description: User registration conflict due to existing user

example.message: A user with this email or username already exists

500.description: Internal server error during user registration

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

currency.description: Currency code for the item price, e.g., USD

quantity.description: Quantity of the product in the cart

items.description: List of items in the cart

payableAmount.description: Total amount to be paid after discounts

totalAmount.description: Sum of original prices of all items

totalDiscount.description: Aggregate discount applied to the cart

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the cart

userId.description: Identifier for the user owning the cart

discount.description: Discount applied on the order item

finalPrice.description: Final price after discount on this item

price.description: Original price of the order item

productId.description: Unique identifier for the product ordered

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created

items.description: List of items included in the order

payableAmount.description: Total amount to be paid for the order

paymentStatus.description: Current payment status of the order

status.description: Current fulfillment status of the order

totalAmount.description: Sum of all item prices before discount

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied on the order

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was last updated

userId.description: Identifier for the user who placed the order

amount.description: The total amount to be paid.

currency.description: The currency code in ISO 4217 format for the payment.

orderId.description: The unique identifier for the order related to this payment.

paymentGateway.description: The payment gateway that will process the payment.

paymentMethod.description: The method of payment used by the customer, e.g. credit card, PayPal.

amount.description: The amount that was processed in the payment.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the payment was created.

currency.description: The currency code for the payment.

orderId.description: The unique identifier for the order related to this payment.

paymentId.description: The unique identifier assigned to the payment transaction.

paymentMethod.description: The method used to pay, e.g., credit card, bank transfer.

status.description: Current status of the payment, such as completed, pending, or failed.

transactionId.description: The transaction identifier from the payment gateway.

gatewayResponse.description: Response message from the payment gateway after processing.

paymentId.description: Identifier of the payment associated with this webhook event.

status.description: The updated status of the payment from the webhook notification.

transactionId.description: Transaction ID provided by the payment gateway for reference.

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available in stock.

brand.description: The brand name of the product.

category.description: The category to which the product belongs.

currency.description: The currency code used for the price.

price.description: The selling price of the product.

rating.description: Average customer rating of the product from 1 to 5.

stock.description: Quantity of the product currently in stock.

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available for purchase

brand.description: The brand name of the product

category.description: Category to which the product belongs

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 date when the product was created

currency.description: Currency code for the product price

description.example: A durable and efficient Bluetooth speaker

price.description: Price of the product in specified currency

rating.description: Average user rating of the product

stock.description: Number of product units currently in stock

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 date when the product was last updated

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier service handling the delivery

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of the last status update

trackingId.description: Tracking number provided by the courier

active.description: Indicates if the user account is active

phone.description: User's phone number including country code

preferredCurrency.description: Currency code user prefers for transactions

active.description: Indicates whether the user account is active

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 date when the user account was created

phone.description: User's phone number including country code

preferredCurrency.description: Currency code preferred by the user for transactions

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 date when the user account was last updated

userType.description: Role or type of the user account

status.description: HTTP status code related to the error

path.description: Request path that caused the error

details.description: List of detailed issues with specific fields

status.description: HTTP status code related to the error
